title: FM-20 check_observer_staleness() root cause fix + 3-layer expansion
method: Audit check_observer_staleness() in maintenance_drift.py. Traced 0-firing root cause. Fixed session extraction regex. Added source-code and artifact baseline scanning layers.
expect: 12+ tools with stale baselines (>30 sessions). Mean staleness >50 sessions. Auto-detection reduces manual audit from 12 tools to 0.

root_cause.description: Session extraction regex S(\d+) doesn't match INDEX.md format 'Sessions: NNN'
root_cause.effect: sess=0 every invocation → early exit at 'if sess < 50' guard

three_layers.layer_1: Data-file baselines (proxy-K, dispatch calibration, compaction floor) — original 3 checks
three_layers.layer_2: Source-code baselines (tools/*.py S-number scan) — NEW, catches 6 items
three_layers.layer_3: Experiment artifact baselines (session-stamped JSON) — NEW, catches 1 item

complementarity_with_s427.swiss_cheese: FM-20 now has 2 independent automated layers: orient.py + maintenance.py

actual: 7 stale items (mean 125s, max 238s). Root cause: regex mismatch (27 sessions of silent failure). 2nd automated layer deployed. FM-20: UNMITIGATED → ADEQUATE.
diff: Expected 12+ stale items, found 7 at source_threshold=80. Some tools excluded (test files, routing tools). Mean 125s exceeds expected >50. Root cause (regex bug) was NOT predicted — expected scope gap, found input-parsing bug.
